capabilities.evidence: Sitemap/robots/routes exist; live GSC data requires deployment and property validation.
Route/topic architecture supports tracking; Semrush data is external and not present.
Manifest and answer registries provide structured source of truth; rewrites must preserve clinical governance.
Approved AI answer packets, visible rendering, QA and schema hardening exist.
Priority service taxonomy and treatment routes support gap mapping; competitor data not present in repo.
Local identity, support markets and priority services are structured.
